description_long: This is a rectangular book with a predominantly light-colored cover, featuring a pixelated, multicolored illustration on the front. The front cover displays a vertical arrangement of pastel blocks in blue, pink, purple, and orange hues, suggesting a stylized or abstract design. The back cover is plain with a beige, blocky pattern reminiscent of wood or a minimalist texture. The book's spine is thin and light-colored, with no visible text or decoration. The object appears to be of standard paperback thickness and size, suitable for carrying or reading in an urban environment. The overall appearance is modern and visually engaging, with a focus on geometric and abstract art.
description: A light-colored book with a pixelated, multicolored abstract illustration on the front and a plain beige back cover.
description_view_0: The front cover features a pixelated, multicolored abstract illustration with pastel blocks and some visible text.
description_view_1: The spine is thin, light-colored, and appears undecorated with no visible text or design.
description_view_2: The back cover is plain, displaying a beige, blocky pattern with no illustrations or text.
description_view_3: Another side view of the thin, undecorated spine, similar to view 1.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a pixelated, abstract illustration composed of stacked pastel blocks in blue, pink, purple, and orange. The style is geometric and modern, with a visually engaging arrangement of colors and shapes.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is light-colored and plain, with no visible text or decorative elements. It appears simple and undecorated.
